page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion: the Iron Maiden 2nd 4-Koma Manga Theater
text:
is a manga anthology series based on the Neon Genesis Evangelion: the Iron Maiden 2nd video game. It is compiled into three volumes and it was published by Square Enix between 14 November 2003 and 20 January 2005.
